race.comment: RAISED BY WOLVES (9) finished second at Coffs Harbour two runs back but was less effective last time over 1812m at this track, finishing ninth. Won't find this as tough and capable of better. STEEL RAIN (3) finished second at Tuncurry two runs back. Didn't measure up last time over 1812m at this track when eighth. This doesn't look as hard so he can find the winners' list. KEN'KER (1) was out of the money two runs back then again missed the frame last start over 1350m at Beaumont (Newcastle) when tenth after being prominent at the turn. Perfectly placed and is sure to prove tough to beat. SUPER JAIE (4) progressed nicely last time out to finish just a head from the winner in second over 1500m at this track. Suitably placed so he can be prominent again.
